about

about

our vision

At Retrofit Construction, we believe that the most sustainable buildings are those that already exist. Our vision is to help our clients unlock the full potential of these structures by implementing meaningful upgrades that enhance energy efficiency, comfort, health, resiliency, and market value. While the construction industry advances toward new sustainable builds, our focus is on revitalizing the craftsmanship of the past while addressing modern energy challenges. Through our expertise and innovative solutions, we ensure that each retrofit sets new benchmarks for sustainability. Driven by a commitment to reducing the environmental footprint of the built environment, we work closely with our clients to deliver customized solutions that make a lasting impact. As Winston Churchill wisely stated: "We shape our buildings; thereafter they shape us."

our offer

At Retrofit Construction, we recognize that every building is a unique opportunity to create lasting value. Our approach is tailored to meet the specific needs of each project, ensuring that whether it’s a residential, commercial, or multi-unit development, the result is a high-performance space that embodies sustainability, comfort, and resilience. We are dedicated to transforming existing structures into models of efficiency and well-being, applying our expertise to deliver outcomes that truly matter. With specialized knowledge in guiding projects toward Net-Zero and Net-Zero Ready certifications, as well as expertise in Passive House and EnerPHit standards, we offer a level of insight that supports the highest standards of sustainable construction. We collaborate closely with our clients to ensure that every solution is perfectly tailored to their unique vision and goals. While based in the Greater Montreal area, we serve clients who prioritize quality and sustainability in their projects. Our commitment is to deliver results that not only meet but exceed expectations, contributing to a built environment that supports a sustainable future.

our founder

Fellipe Falluh has always been passionate about sustainable building, a value rooted in his family and education. Knowing from a young age that he wanted to make a difference in the built environment, Fellipe pursued a degree in Environmental and Civil Engineering from McGill University, and at just 24 years old, founded Retrofit Construction. Fellipe’s expertise in deep energy retrofits is complemented by his commitment to industry education and content creation, believing that true change comes from collective efforts. His vision is to drive the industry toward a more sustainable future, where every building maximizes its potential for efficiency and comfort. As Vice President of the board at Bâtiment Passif Québec, Fellipe plays a key role in advancing Passive House principles across the province. Co-founder of the podcast Au-Delà des Murs, he engages with professionals in high-performance construction to foster dialogue and innovation. As an Energy Efficiency Trailblazer for Efficiency Canada, his story inspires others to embrace energy efficiency, extending his impact beyond individual projects to the broader community.
